botcomponent.description: Helps organizations assess compliance readiness under the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023 by guiding users through a structured, step-by-step assessment. The agent asks targeted questions, explains each requirement in simple terms with examples, identifies gaps, calculates risk exposure, and generates a structured compliance report. It evaluates NDPA compliance, classifies risk, provides recommendations, and produces an audit-style summary. The agent acts as a compliance support tool, not a legal advisor.
botcomponent.name: NDPA Compliance Assistant
